title: Microsoft releases Windows 11 OOB hotpatch to fix RRAS RCE flaw
description: Microsoft has released an out-of-band (OOB) update to fix a security vulnerabilities affecting Windows 11 Enterprise devices that receive hotpatch updates instead of the regular Patch Tuesday cumulative updates. [...]
author: Lawrence Abrams

title: AppsFlyer Web SDK hijacked to spread crypto-stealing JavaScript code
description: The AppsFlyer Web SDK was temporarily hijacked this week with malicious code used to steal cryptocurrency in a supply-chain attack. [...]
author: Bill Toulas
